When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Call a function using Particle. Spark Pixels Current Weather: IF Rain Then Blue. Use with a some Neopixels and the Spark Pixels android app: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=kc.spark.pixels.android&hl=en1Flash your Particle device with the latest Spark Pixels firmware from github: https://github.com/sparcules/Spark_Pixels2To configure the IFTTT set the "Then call (Function Name)", select the *SetMode* function for your Particle device.3 Setup the "with input (Function Input)" to *M:IFTTT WEATHER,C6:0000FF,*, where 0000FF is the hex value for BLUEAlso, don't forget the comma at the end of the color.4Sit back and wait for the weather to change :)
